home.what: This is the official online booking platform of Zhengyuanyuan Foot Spa — one of China's most trusted wellness brands. Find each store's address and contact below; more locations are on the way.
home.who: Built for customers who want to enjoy traditional Chinese foot care, full-body massage and acupuncture in store.

feature.f1_desc: See bookable stores, service items, durations and prices at a glance.
feature.f2_desc: Pick a store, services, preferred therapist and visit time — done in a few steps.
feature.f3_desc: Check your booking history and status anytime, and cancel online when plans change.

google.title: About This App & Google Data Use
google.purpose: Purpose of this app: it lets customers register an account, book in-store services (foot care, massage, acupuncture and more) at Zhengyuanyuan Foot Spa stores online, and view or cancel their bookings at any time.
google.intro: You can sign in with your Google Account. When you choose Google sign-in, we request only your basic profile information (name) and email address, and we use them as follows:
google.use_mail: Email address — used as your account identifier to create and sign in to your booking account, and to send booking-related emails such as confirmations.
google.use_name: Name — used as your display name inside the app.
google.no_share: We do not sell your Google user data, and we do not share it with third parties except as necessary to provide the booking service.

home.services_note: Bookable services vary by store, and prices at the store prevail (cash only; card payments incur extra fees).

promo.tagline: Traditional Chinese Massage · Acupuncture · Foot Care

about.p1: Zhengyuanyuan Foot Spa is proud to bring one of China's most trusted wellness brands to the United States. Our stores carry on the craft of a massage and traditional wellness company that has earned nationwide recognition in China for its healing touch, authentic practices, and modern professionalism.
about.p2: We specialize in traditional Chinese massage, acupuncture, and unique TCM-inspired therapies that blend the best of massage with Eastern medicine. Whether you're coming in for a rejuvenating foot reflexology session, a relaxing herbal foot bath, or a therapeutic cupping or scraping treatment, you'll experience time-honored techniques used to restore energy, improve circulation, and support full-body balance.
about.p3: Our signature offerings also include Chinese medicinal "pedicures", where skilled practitioners use specially prepared herbal soaks and tools to promote detoxification and foot health. These services are based on Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) principles and have long been cherished in China for their wellness benefits.

notes.n1: Listed prices are for cash only. Payment by credit card subject to additional fees.
notes.n2: Every Wednesday is Member Day! Enjoy a special 32% off on Foot Care services.
notes.n3: Ask our front desk about our VIP Membership program.
notes.n4: We accept insurance from Aetna, United Healthcare, and BlueCross BlueShield — contact us to check if your plan is eligible.

promo.testimonials_sub: What our customers say about us:
